Edit videos offline.

No sign-in. No cloud. No watermark. Just fast, local video editing on your Mac.

Available on the Mac App Store

Everything you need

Offline First

Works without an internet connection. Your footage never leaves your machine.

Timeline Editing

Split, trim, and rearrange clips with an intuitive timeline interface.

Color Correction

Professional-grade lift, gamma, and gain wheels for precise color grading.

Keyframe Animation

Animate any property with precise keyframe control.

Title & Text

Add professional titles and text overlays to your videos.

Fast Export

Export to MP4 with customizable presets powered by bundled ffmpeg.

Ready to start editing?

Download mYcutter from the Mac App Store today.
